title: Garlicky Juicy Polish Broccoli Quiche
description: A Polish-inspired quiche filled with garlicky, juicy broccoli and topped with a creamy mantecare emulsion.
instructions: Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Trim the edges and press the dough into the corners of the pan.
In a large skillet, sauté the steamed broccoli and minced garlic over medium heat until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and grated cheddar cheese.
Add the cooked broccoli mixture and season with salt and black pepper.
Pour the egg mixture into the pie crust.
Bake the quiche for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the quiche from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Top the quiche with the mantecare emulsion and serve warm.
